name: Katana
description: Baseline Katana URL discovery using the default crawl behavior.
long_description: Runs Katana with minimal flags for lightweight endpoint and route discovery. Use this as the baseline Katana wrapper when no custom crawl depth or JavaScript crawling is required.

fields.label: Target URL
fields.help: Enter the HTTP(S) URL to crawl for endpoint and route discovery.

safety.consent_message: Crawler generates active traffic. Ensure authorization.
